raw_consumer_statement: My wallet was stolen in XX/XX/2023. The criminal tried to use my Citibank Visa XXXX at XXXX. I called Citibank immediately to report the stolen card, and answered a text from them not to let the charge go through because it was fraud. Citibank went into investigation, and denied my claim, saying I owe them the charge of {$2200.00}. I asked them twice to re-open the case, sending them what they asked for ( my driver 's license and a screen shot of the text ). They are no longer responding, but are now sending me past-due notices and threat of collection.
